sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22331" key="gloiopo/tis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γλοιο-πότις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n22331.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sucking up grease</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χλαμύς</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.282</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Theodor.).</sense> </entryFree>
